zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Owen Perrot於大約1473年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親William Thomas Perrot41歲，母親Jane Wogan34歲。他於1498年與Katherine Poyntz在英國威爾斯布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年4月20日享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Owen Perrot was born about 1473, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, William Thomas Perrot, was 41 and his mother, Jane Wogan, was 34. He married Katherine Poyntz in 1498, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 April 1513, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Owen Perrot est né environ 1473, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, William Thomas Perrot, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jane Wogan, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Poyntz en 1498, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1513, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Owen Perrotが約1473年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父William Thomas Perrotは41歳，母Jane Woganは34歳であった。1498年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでKatherine Poyntzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年4月20日に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Owen Perrot(이)가 대략 1473년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Thomas Perrot(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Wogan(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1498년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Katherine Poyntz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 4월 20일 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Owen Perrot родился около 1473 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени William Thomas Perrot было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Wogan, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Poyntz в 1498 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 апреля 1513 г. в возрасте 41 год.
